'''hasana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thalassine|thalassine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-s-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thalassine|thalassine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hasana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæsænæth|hæsænæth]] || [[word:hæsænæj|hæsænæj]] || [[word:hæsænæsh|hæsænæsh]] || [[word:hæsænæ|hæsænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hasasanath|hasasanath]] || [[word:hasasanaj|hasasanaj]] || [[word:hasasanash|hasasanash]] || [[word:hasasana|hasasana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hasanath|hasanath]] || [[word:hasanaj|hasanaj]] || [[word:hasanash|hasanash]] || [[word:hasana|hasana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hasafnath|hasafnath]] || [[word:hasafnaj|hasafnaj]] || [[word:hasafnash|hasafnash]] || [[word:hasafnaf|hasafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hasanatha|hasanatha]] || [[word:hasanaja|hasanaja]] || [[word:hasanasha|hasanasha]] || [[word:hasanaka|hasanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hasanath|hasanath]] || [[word:hasanaj|hasanaj]] || [[word:hasanash|hasanash]] || [[word:hasana|hasana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hasanathal|hasanathal]] || [[word:hasanajal|hasanajal]] || [[word:hasanashal|hasanashal]] || [[word:hasanakal|hasanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hasanathatha|hasanathatha]] || [[word:hasanajaja|hasanajaja]] || [[word:hasanashasha|hasanashasha]] || [[word:hasanaka|hasanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hasanathan|hasanathan]] || [[word:hasanajan|hasanajan]] || [[word:hasanashan|hasanashan]] || [[word:hasanakan|hasanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hasanathaoro|hasanathaoro]] || [[word:hasanajaoro|hasanajaoro]] || [[word:hasanashaoro|hasanashaoro]] || [[word:hasanakaoro|hasanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
